meta.description: Synthetic Nordic supply chain disruption: port congestion and storm-driven demand surge

initial.last_summary: Supply chain baseline: mild pre-season demand, minor port congestion

ticks.observation: Demand uptick due to cold snap; Helsinki port congestion causing 2-day delays on inbound freight
Storm impact: Oulu road closures blocking 3 outbound shipments, e-commerce demand surging
Critical: Helsinki inventory below safety stock threshold; emergency restocking order raised
Shortage confirmed in both regions; alternate routing via Tampere hub activated, air freight considered
Emergency restocking partially successful; Helsinki recovering, Oulu still constrained
Demand normalising as weather improves; port congestion easing, delayed shipments clearing
